adapted: Next 16 + Supabase (auth/db) — shared project, schema per kit; not better-auth/Drizzle

adoption_note: Hand-crafted from qkit boilerplate, then adopted. settings.json omits the broad permissions.allow list (auto-mode self-modification guard); deny + ask retained. Not adopted (same divergences as qkit): lefthook, pino route-logging, tc CI/harness-verifier layer, better-auth/Drizzle. No .harness-base (adopted post-hoc) so migrate Phase-5 re-sync is N/A.
